channel.title: Astro Cactus
channel.description: An opinionated starter theme for Astro

item.title: A post of Markdown elements
item.description: This post is for testing and listing a number of different markdown elements

item.title: Markdown Admonitions
item.description: This post showcases using the markdown admonition feature in Astro Cactus

item.title: サボテンテーマでの初投稿！
Example Cover Image
item.description: This post is an example of how to add a cover/hero image

item.title: A working draft title
item.description: This post is for testing the draft post functionality

item.title: Lorem ipsum dolor sit, amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Id
item.description: This post is purely for testing if the css is correct for the title on the page

item.title: Example OG Social Image
item.description: An example post for Astro Cactus, detailing how to add a custom social image card in the frontmatter

item.title: Adding Webmentions to Astro Cactus
item.description: This post describes the process of adding webmentions to your own site
